title: Dargul Dianogas
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Dargul Dianogas''' were a [[Shockball/Legends|shockball]] team from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dargul]]. They once played the [[Rampa Rancors]] at the [[Innerdome Arena]] of [[Nwarcol Point]].

==Sources==
